_comment: Egg template for the Minecraft: Modpack - Installer plugin. The 'scripts.installation.script' placeholder is substituted at import time by Plugins\MinecraftModpackInstaller\Services\EggImporter (it injects the contents of resources/eggs/peregrine-modpack-installer.sh).
name: Peregrine Modpack Installer
author: plugins@peregrine.app
description: Universal Minecraft modpack installer for the Peregrine panel. Downloads and deploys a server-ready modpack from Modrinth, CurseForge, ATLauncher, Feed The Beast, Technic or VoidsWrath, then hands the server back to its native runtime egg.

variables.name: Modpack provider
variables.description: Internal identifier of the marketplace from which the modpack is downloaded. Set automatically by the plugin; do not edit.

variables.name: Modpack ID
variables.description: Provider-side identifier of the modpack. Set automatically by the plugin; do not edit.

variables.name: Modpack version ID
variables.description: Provider-side identifier of the version to install. Set automatically by the plugin; do not edit.

variables.name: Minecraft version
variables.description: Minecraft version targeted by this modpack version, when available. Optional.

variables.name: Purge before install
variables.description: When 1, the server filesystem is wiped before the modpack is downloaded.

variables.name: CurseForge API key
variables.description: Operator-managed CurseForge API key, forwarded only when the provider is curseforge. Stored encrypted in the plugin settings; never displayed.

variables.name: Server jar file
variables.description: Filename of the runnable server jar after install. The script symlinks server.jar to whatever it finds.

variables.name: Operation mode
variables.description: When 'uninstall' the script wipes /mnt/server and exits without downloading anything; otherwise runs the normal modpack install. Set automatically by the plugin during the two-phase uninstall flow; do not edit.
